name: Corned Beef & Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 1 head Cabbage, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a removable crock pot liner with the cabbage on top.
2. Cut the corned beef to fit the crock pot if necessary.
3. Place the liner with the mixture into the base of the crock pot.
4. Cover and cook on low for 10-12 hours, or high for 6-7 hours, or auto for 6-8 hours.
